name: GPT-3.5 Turbo
note: Chat-tuned model behind ChatGPT's Nov 2022 launch; still served today with a 16K context window at $0.50/$1.50 per million tokens.

results.notes: reported in GPT-4 technical report comparison table
gpt-3.5-turbo-0613 snapshot, win rate vs gpt-4-0314 baseline, official arena-hard-auto leaderboard (2024-07-31 data)
GPT 3.5 Turbo (06/13), length-controlled win rate, official AlpacaEval 2.0 leaderboard data
gpt-3.5-turbo-0613 Elo, LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard update, Dec 2023
GPT-4-judged MT-Bench score for gpt-3.5-turbo, Table 8 of the original MT-Bench / Chatbot Arena paper (Zheng et al., 2023)
Gorilla paper (Patil et al. 2023), Table 1: gpt-3.5-turbo-0301, zero-shot, no retriever, overall AST accuracy on TorchHub subset of APIBench.
Gorilla paper (Patil et al., arXiv 2305.15334), Table 1 — zero-shot, no-retriever accuracy on APIBench (HuggingFace subset). Model evaluated as gpt-3.5-turbo-0301 checkpoint.

Gorilla paper (Patil et al. 2023), Table 1: zero-shot (no retriever) overall accuracy on the TensorFlow Hub (TensorHub) split of APIBench, using the gpt-3.5-turbo-0301 checkpoint (hallu 78.65%, err 3.13%).

Vicuna benchmark Elo rating (human-judged), rank 7 of 8, from Table 1/7 of the QLoRA paper (Dettmers et al., arXiv:2305.14314), listed there as 'ChatGPT-3.5 Turbo'. GPT-4-judged Elo for the same model was 966 in the paper's companion table.
Reported as 'ChatGPT-3.5 Turbo', GPT-4-judged Elo rating on the OpenAssistant benchmark (953 prompts), rank 2, from the QLoRA paper (Dettmers et al., Table 7).
LogicKor official leaderboard, model_id openai/gpt-3.5-turbo-0125, default prompt strategy

JASTER (jaster) 0-shot average, Table 2 of Preferred Networks' 'PLaMo-100B: A Ground-Up Language Model Designed for Japanese Proficiency' (arXiv:2410.07563). GPT-3.5 Turbo scored 0.567 as a comparison baseline in the paper's jaster results table (alongside GPT-4-0125-Preview 0.722, PLaMo-100B-Instruct 0.738); evaluation run via the same jaster/llm-jp-eval harness used for PLaMo-100B's own already-tracked jaster rows in this catalog. Not self-reported by OpenAI, hence classified independent.

verificationNotes: Release confirmed March 1, 2023 via OpenAI's 'Introducing ChatGPT and Whisper APIs' post. Current 16,385-token context and $0.50/$1.50 per-million pricing confirmed on OpenAI's live model docs page. All 7 benchmark rows (MMLU 70.0, HellaSwag 85.5, ARC 85.2, Winogrande 81.6, HumanEval 48.1, DROP 64.1 F1, GSM8K 57.1) verified to literally appear in arXiv 2303.08774's GPT-3.5 comparison column. No changes made.
